text: Saad's is the best Middle Eastern food in the city. Best maybe i've ever had. Don't believe me? Try the Lamb Kabob sandwich. That lamb tastes like it was killed with a machete, and knowing Saad, it probably was. The weird thing about this place is that all the Muslims in there are always eating American food like wings and cheese steaks. This place is Halal, which is like Islamic Kosher, so i guess it's the only place hardcore Muslims can eat that type of food. And i bet it's pretty tasty, but if you find yourself there, make sure to order the middle eastern food, cuz it's the balls. p.s. i gave them a check for dessert cuz they have rice pudding and baklava.
